LeidenUniv.Omero

Class OmeroConnectAndAttach<T extends net.imglib2.type.numeric.RealType<T>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.scijava.AbstractContextual
      • org.scijava.command.ContextCommand
        • LeidenUniv.Omero.OmeroConnectAndAttach<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ij.gui.DialogListener, java.lang.Runnable, org.scijava.Cancelable, org.scijava.command.Command, org.scijava.Contextual, org.scijava.plugin.SciJavaPlugin

extends org.scijava.command.ContextCommand
implements ij.gui.DialogListener

      • attachFileToDataset

        public void attachFileToDataset(java.io.File file,
                                java.lang.String description,
                                java.lang.String NAME_SPACE_TO_SET,
                                java.lang.String datatype)
        Parameters:
        file - the file to attach
        description - a description of the file
        NAME_SPACE_TO_SET - the name space of the filtype you want to attach
        datatype - the type of data to set the Mimetype

      • attachFile

        description - a description of the file

        datatype - the type of data to set the Mimetype

                                                    omero.gateway.facility.DataManagerFacility dm)

        description - of the file
        NAME_SPACE_TO_SET - the name space of the filetype you want to attach
        datatype - the type of data to set the Mimetype
        dm - the datamanagerfacility that is currently in use
        Returns:
        the created fileannotation for the file
